title: combretum llewelynii
intro: Combretum llewelynii is a species of flowering plant in the family Combretaceae, commonly known as the yellow fever tree due to its association with the disease. The plant has been traditionally used in African folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Combretum llewelynii include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves or bark in water, and have been used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
